arts.ttl: Man United and Rangers isn't a Battle of Britain but a meeting of lost souls, writes IAN LADYMAN - this is how they got stuck in a broken cycle, drowned out by their noisy neighbours
arts.sum: IAN LADYMAN: In Glasgow they have a word to describe the way the football landscape has changed. They talk of the Espanyolification of Scotland's footballing capital.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford ‘resigned’ to remaining at Manchester United despite Barcelona links
arts.sum: Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford wants to go to Barcelona, and Barcelona want to bring in Marcus Rashford, but the deal is on the rocks as time ticks on in the January transfer window. The England striker looked set to leave Old Trafford this winter, but his options are fading away. arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim has the WORST Man Utd win rate in 94 years
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has the worst win rate of any Manchester United manager for 94 years, underlining just what a horrific start it has been for him at Old Trafford. Ruben Amorim has the WORST Man Utd win rate in 94 years

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim on why Old Trafford has become the Theatre of Dread for Man Utd
arts.sum: Manchester United have lost four of their last five home games and Ruben Amorim admits his players are struggling to play at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Manchester United only club to make ‘formal offer’ for player – Player pushing for transfer
arts.sum: Manchester United are the only side to have made a ‘formal offer’ for Patrick Dorgu at this moment in time but could be behind Napoli. That’s according to Tuttomercatoweb, who report that Napoli’s willingness to sanction a loan deal means they have an advantage. arts.ttl: Harry Maguire sends demand to Man Utd team-mates after Ruben Amorim's brutal blast
arts.sum: Harry Maguire is calling on Manchester United's players to stand up and be counted before Europa League clash against Rangers and weekend Premier League trip to Fulham

arts.ttl: Man United offered 'discount' to sign prolific Napoli striker as part of Alejandro Garnacho deal
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly given the chance to sign a prolific striker for a cut-price fee as part of a deal which would see Alejandro Garnacho join Napoli.

arts.ttl: Man United 'put together four-man striker shortlist' as Red Devils 'look to boost attack' before January transfer window closes
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly place Ipswich Town's Liam Delap, Brentford's Bryan Mbeumo, Wolverhampton Wanderers' Matheus Cunha and Lille's Jonathan David on their four-man striker shortlist.

arts.ttl: Man Utd's pacey goal machine, 'next Wayne Rooney' and quartet who can save club millions
arts.sum: Manchester United are struggling at the minute, but they have several highly-rated youngsters on their books, who could help fire the club back to the glory years
